title: Usufructuary may not create mineral servitude
doc_html:
§26.  Usufructuary may not create mineral servitude

A usufructuary cannot establish a mineral servitude on the estate of which he has the usufruct even for the period of his usufruct.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
